name: Yext
description: Yext — AI search platform for structured data, site search, and knowledge graph management.

seo.title: Yext — Search / Recommendations API
seo.meta_description: Yext: Yext — AI search platform for structured data, site search, and knowledge graph management.

when_to_use: AI site search for structured knowledge graph data
Local listings management across directories for brands
Answer layer search for SaaS product knowledge base
Structured data search for multi-location retail brand
Knowledge graph API for entity-driven search results

pros: Knowledge graph model structures FAQ and entity data well
Strong enterprise presence with location and listings experience
Direct-answer search beats keyword-only for many queries
Mature integrations with CRM and marketing stacks
cons: Knowledge graph setup requires real content investment
Competes with generative AI answer engines on core value
Newer AI search entrants chip at differentiation
review.verdict: Strong for structured brand and location answers, but the generative AI wave is narrowing Yext's moat.
review.best_for: Large brands unifying listings, FAQ, and structured answers across touchpoints.
review.not_for: SMBs, devs wanting lightweight search, or content-light sites.

pricing.high_water_mark_reason: custom pricing alone is not HWM evidence
